MELItem.Title: Engine Oil Filter Bypass Warning Systems (GE)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided the associated engine oil debris monitoring system (DMS) sensor operates normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify that the malfunction is in the alerting system following Maintenance Message 79-32511 or 79-32512- Fault Isolation Procedure. (AMM DDG 79-35-02).

ListItem.Para: Confirm no debris found from the associated engine oil filter element inspection.
Perform AMM DMC-B787-A-G79-35-01-00A-510B-A - Oil Filter Differential Pressure Sensor – Deactivation.
Verify no showing of status message ENG OIL DMS L or ENG OIL DMS R on each departure.
